name: Lamb w/ Yoghurt, Coconut Milk & Almond Masala (Badami Gosht)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drop the saffron threads into a small bowl or cup, add 1/3 of the boiling water and soak for at least 10 minutes.
2. Pour the saffron and its soaking liquid into a deep bowl and stir in the yoghurt, caraway seeds, salt, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, onions, garlic, and ginger. Heat the ghee until fairly hot in a heavy casserole.
3. Add the cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves to the ghee for 1 minute or so, then add the onions, garlic, and ginger. Fry for 7 to 8 minutes until soft and golden brown.
4. Remove the lamb from the marinade with a slotted spoon and add it to the casserole. Stir until it browns evenly.
5. Stir in the remaining marinade, cold water, almond puree, and red pepper. Cook for 10 minutes stirring occasionally.
6. Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a boil. Simmer partially covered for 20 minutes or until the lamb is tender.
7. Discard the cinnamon and cloves before serving. Mound the lamb attractively on a heated platter and pour the sauce over it.
